meaning: n.[海]桅楼守望者,锯木时在上端的人,地面矿工
examples: "The very first soccer whistles were made in 1884, " says Simon Topman, Acme's owner and a man with a clear passion for whistles and their history.
But Simon Topman, CEO of the Acme Whistle Company, said that stamp duty would be a bad idea and wanted a more transparent way of raising taxes.
"We opened seven SimplyBe stores last year, and now there is the male version, Jacamo, in five of them, dual-fascia stores like Topshop and Topman, " says director Paul Kendrick.
